verse_text: 'You shall make bars of incorruptible wood: five for the posts on one side of the tabernacle,

links.context: , 2 The sickle is "scroll" in Hebrew. Both are indicative of judgment. The sickle is huge, of roughly the same dimensions as the tabernacle in the wilderness (see [[EXO.26:15]]-28) or the porch of Solomon's temple (see 3Kg 6:6, 7).
